creator: zeising@FreeBSD.org
text:
the firmware kernel module is needed, yes.
All modern GPUs load firmware using the FreeBSD infrastructure for managing firmware modules.  This is true regardless of using any of the new drm-*-kmod versions, drm-legacy-kmod, or the old drm kmod modules in base.

This might be why you got software rendering earlier, because it failed to load even the old modules in base, but I don't know.
